name: Pipeline: Analyze
description: Sub-workflow: speaker ID, topic segmentation, per-topic analysis, assemble minutes, create vault note.

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.item.json;
const topicName = item.topicName;

const systemPrompt = `You analyze a SINGLE TOPIC from a meeting transcript.
Output must be in this exact markdown format:

### ${topicName}
<one sentence summarizing the outcome — REPLACE this instruction with your actual summary, never echo instructions>

**Key Points:**
List 3-7 concrete bullets summarizing what was discussed. Include specifics: numbers, owners, systems, dates.
Attribute key points to the speaker who made them. Example: "Rantala Petri noted that the timeline needs adjustment" or "Kasi Jukka proposed using the new API".
Do NOT include raw transcript timestamps like [00:01:30.000] or raw speaker labels like [Name] — instead weave attribution naturally into the sentence.
Do NOT list action items here — they go in the ACTION ITEMS section below.

**Outcome:** Write exactly one of: "Decision made", "Action items created", "Information shared", or "No outcome". Nothing else.

IF a concrete decision was made in this topic, include:
#### DECISION
**What:** describe the decision concisely
If NO decision was made, OMIT the #### DECISION section entirely. Do NOT write "No decision" or leave it empty.

IF concrete action items or follow-ups were agreed, include:
#### ACTION ITEMS
- [ ] ***Action Point:*** <emoji> **What:** <task> **Who:** [[Lastname Firstname]] **When:** YYYY-MM-DD
Every action item line MUST start with exactly: - [ ] ***Action Point:*** <emoji>
If NO action items exist, OMIT the #### ACTION ITEMS section entirely. Do NOT write "No action items" or leave it empty.

RULES:
- Use complexity emoji inline on action items: 🟩 (<1h) 🟨 (1-4h) 🟧 (1-3d) 🟥 (>3d). Do NOT output a legend block.
- Names MUST be [[Lastname Firstname]] order (family name first). If BOTH first AND last name are known, always write [[Lastname Firstname]]. First-name-only stays plain text, no wikilink.
- NAME SPELLING: Use exact name spellings from the participant list but ALWAYS reorder to Lastname Firstname. For example, if participant list says "Johanna Aivio", write [[Aivio Johanna]].
- Do NOT invent facts. Only use what is explicitly in the transcript.
- SPEAKERS: ONLY the people in the Participants list are present and speaking in this meeting. Any other names mentioned in the conversation are people being DISCUSSED, not speakers. NEVER attribute statements or opinions to anyone not in the Participants list. Write "The participants discussed [Name]" instead of "[Name] said/mentioned/expressed".
- Only create action items for REAL commitments or follow-ups agreed in the meeting. Do NOT create action items for things already done (like "confirm arrival") or trivial logistics.
- **When:** If a specific deadline is mentioned in the transcript, use it (YYYY-MM-DD). If NO deadline is mentioned, derive from complexity + meeting date:
  🟩 Easy → meeting date + 3 days
  🟨 Involved → meeting date + 7 days
  🟧 Moderate → meeting date + 14 days
  🟥 Hard → meeting date + 30 days
  Calculate the actual date. Never use TBD unless the action is explicitly deferred. Never use dates before the meeting date.
- Meeting date: ${item.date}
- Language: Business American English.`;

// Cap topic transcript to fit qwen3:8b context (32k tokens ~ 80k chars)
const MAX_TOPIC_CHARS = 28000;
const safeTranscript = item.topicTranscript.length > MAX_TOPIC_CHARS
    ? item.topicTranscript.substring(0, MAX_TOPIC_CHARS) + '\n\n[... topic section truncated — analyze what is visible above ...]'
    : item.topicTranscript;

const safeTopic = item.topicName.replace(/`/g, "'");

const userMsg = `### ${safeTopic}\nContext: ${item.topicSummary || 'see transcript'}\nParticipants: ${item.participantStr}\n${item.context ? 'Background: ' + item.context + '\n' : ''}\nTranscript:\n${safeTranscript}`;

return { json: {
    topicIndex: item.topicIndex,
    topicName: item.topicName,
    totalTopics: item.totalTopics,
    body: JSON.stringify({
        model: 'qwen3.5:27b-32k',
        stream: false,
        think: false,
        num_ctx: 32768,
        system: systemPrompt,
        prompt: userMsg
    })
} };
